name: mojo-empty-tensor-shape-hash-differ
description: Test pattern for verifying that empty Mojo ExTensors with different shapes produce different hashes. Use when: (1) adding coverage that shape dimensions feed into __hash__ when numel=0, (2) verifying that [0] vs [0,0] vs [0,1] tensors are distinguishable by hash, (3) following up on empty-tensor hash equality tests with a shape-discrimination variant.
